programme.title: Waiting for Anya
programme.desc: From the mind of world-renowned author Michael Morpurgo comes the cinematic adaptation of Waiting for Anya - a powerful and authentic true story of a young shepherd that had a key part to play in one of the world's most shocking moments in history.

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: FBI agent Malcolm Turner is known best for being a brilliant, master of disguise. Malcolm's latest assignment sends him to small-town Georgia, where he's assigned to trap a brutal bank robber who the FBI suspects will be coming down to visit his ex-girlfriend Sherry and her son.

programme.title: The Accidental Husband
programme.desc: Everything is running smoothly for popular radio DJ Dr. Emma Lloyd in the run up to her own wedding when she makes the shocking discovery: she's already married – and to someone else!

programme.title: Romance Retreat
programme.desc: After a big breakup, journalist Dana Willingham finds herself alone and stuck at a couple's yoga retreat while the biggest story of her career breaks far away. And she doesn't even like yoga! But maybe the universe has put her here for a reason, because the handsome loner staying at the lodge turns out to be Stefan Gonzales, the tech guru at the center of the scandal. As she gains his trust to expose him, she finds herself falling in love with him. Now she must use the lessons from yoga to choose: the perfect story or the perfect man?

programme.title: Perfect Wedding
programme.desc: مضطرين للعمل معًا ، يتعلم مخطط الزفاف ومخطط الحدث أن المتناقضات يمكن أن تنتج أكثر النتائج غير المتوقعة.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries
programme.sub-title: S01:E17 - Remembering Diana Princess Of Wales
programme.desc: 回憶威爾士的戴安娜公主包括她國葬的場景和她親密朋友們的感人言辭。這是一個對戴安娜的溫暖而深思的看法，既是作為一個人，也是作為一個公共人物：那位從未成為女王的公主，和將永遠被銘記的公主。

programme.title: Wedding Wonderland
programme.desc: When family conflicts arise between happy couple Hallie and Lucas during the week before their big day, their plans for a breezy wedding in the tropics take a turn and their love is tested when they are forced to put on a small-town winter wedding in the snow.

programme.title: Love Strikes Twice
programme.desc: In this Christmas time romantic comedy, Caroline is unhappy in her marriage and makes her way to file for divorce. On the way, she is in an accident and she sees her love life differently, as amnesia is now setting in.

programme.title: Mirrors
programme.desc: From the director of The Hills Have Eyes comes the terrifying story of troubled ex-cop who must save his family from an unspeakable evil that is using mirrors as a gateway into their home.

programme.title: My All American
programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: Cybermutt
programme.desc: The powerful dog Rex is injured by a car while rescuing a young scientist from being run over. Feeling responsible for the condition of Rex the scientist uses his skill as a prosthetics inventor to give the dog a new, super-power body.

programme.title: Agent Cody Banks
programme.desc: To his family and friends, Cody Banks is a typical teen. But Cody has a secret - he's actually part of an undercover teen CIA program and has 5 years of special training under his belt.

programme.title: Hellboy: Sword of Storms
programme.desc: A folklore professor becomes unwittingly possessed by the ancient Japanese demons of Thunder and Lightning.

programme.title: Horns
programme.desc: After his girlfriend's mysterious death, a young man awakens to find strange horns sprouting from his forehead

programme.title: USS Indianapolis: Men of Courage
programme.desc: The harrowing tale of American heroes shipwrecked in shark-infested waters in the waning days of WWII.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: An officer embarks on a revenge mission against the man who tortured him while he was a prisoner during WWII.

programme.title: Acts of Vengeance
programme.desc: A fast-talking lawyer transforms his body and takes a vow of silence, not to be broken until he finds out who killed his wife and daughter and has his revenge.

programme.title: The World's Fastest Indian
programme.desc: Anthony Hopkins stars as Burt Munro, a man who never let the dreams of youth fade. After a lifetime of perfecting his classic Indian motorcycle, Burt set off from the bottom of the world to test his bike at the Bonneville Salt Flats in Utah. With all the odds against him, he set a new speed record and captured the spirit of his times. Burt Munro's 1967 world record remains unbroken and his legend lives on today.

programme.title: Cold Brook
programme.desc: One fateful evening, after working late hours at the museum, two maintenance workers see a man standing silently near a Civil War exhibit. Despite chasing him away, each night he returns. Soon Ted and George learn that no one else can see the mysterious figure dressed in centuries-old clothing his name is Gil Le Doux and he's searching for a way home.

programme.title: You Can't Fight Christmas
programme.desc: Interior decorator and Christmas fanatic, Leslie Major, has the yearly task of decorating the lobby of the famed Chesterton Hotel. But one fateful day whilst working on a ladder to reach the top of the tree, she falls into the arms of Edmund James, the grandson of the hotel's owner. However, Edmund is all business and plans to put an end to the annual tradition. Can Leslie work her magic and teach him to love Christmas?

programme.title: The Farm
programme.desc: FrightFest Presents. A brutal, gore-tastic slasher/survival horror, in the vein of The Texas Chainsaw Massacre and Wolf Creek. While on a road trip a couple decide to stop at a diner. Little do they know that ordering a hamburger will have terrible consequences. Their journey soon becomes a harrowing story of survival as they are kidnapped by local farmers. On their farm, humans are the main dish.

programme.title: One Small Hitch
programme.desc: A heart-warming romantic comedy in which childhood friends Josh (Shane McCrae: The Help) and Molly (Aubrey Dollar: Failure to Launch) fake their marriage plans for the benefit of the groom's dying father. However, things get out of hand when they find themselves obliged to stage a phoney wedding. When the pretence gives way to real feelings, they have some serious decisions to make!

programme.title: Permanent
programme.desc: Prep-hair to scale frizzy heights in this feel-good, coming of age 80s comedy, starring Patricia Arquette (Boyhood) and Rainn Wilson (The Office). Having moved to small town Virginia, the Dicksons are just about making it through the day (amidst life's chaos)! To add to the mayhem, 13 year-old Aurelie desperately wants a new hairstyle to fit in with her peers, but accidentally ends up with a perm!

programme.title: The Fortress
programme.desc: From the mastermind behind Squid Game. The fate of a nation is at stake in this lavish historical war epic. Based on the 17th century Chinese invasion of Korea and its subsequent subjugation of the royal court. 1636, Korea's Joseon kingdom is invaded by a Chinese army aligned with the Manchu Qing dynasty. King Injo and his men take refuge in a mountain fortress, but the bitter feud continues.

programme.title: Love & Other Drugs
programme.desc: A womanizing Viagra salesman with no sense of direction or responsibility falls in love with a free-spirited woman.

programme.title: Little Manhattan
programme.desc: Little Manhattan is a feel-good comedy that's perfect for kids and adults alike. In a city known for excitement, two young friends are about to embark on the greatest adventure of all.

programme.title: A Taste of Love
programme.desc: A struggling TV chef returns home to find that her family's restaurant is for sale, not able to compete with contemporary cuisine. Trying to save it, she reconnects with her childhood sweetheart and finds the inspiration she was seeking.

programme.title: Love In Wolf Creek
programme.desc: On the verge of losing her wildlife refuge, Sam, along with the town's handsome newcomer, Austin, risk it all to save an injured white wolf.

programme.title: The Wedding Fix
programme.desc: Reeling from a break-up, professional over-planner Gwen pitches in to help put the finishing touches on her best friend's wedding. But when she's teamed up with best man Josh, a free-spirited nature guide, she finds that pulling together this wedding might not be as easy as she thought.

programme.title: Keeping Up With The Kandasamys
programme.desc: Matriarchal rivals of neighboring families, whose young adult children become romantically involved - try despite their best efforts - to keep them apart with hilarious results.

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: Jillian inherits a beautiful mountainside cabin after her long-lost, wealthy uncle dies. She plans to sell it, but handsome caretaker Liam makes her an offer she can't refuse, and sparks fly as they work to transform the cabin into a holiday resort.

programme.title: Bridal Fever
programme.desc: It's a literal race to the alter when a steamy romance novelist with a long line of torrid romances – and ex-husbands – sets out to help her editor, a single bachelorette, ditch her bridesmaid gowns once and for all in this romantic comedy.

programme.title: Groomzilla
programme.desc: A woman is surprised and dismayed when her fiance takes the planning of their wedding too seriously.

programme.title: 2 Years of Love
programme.desc: Samantha has a great marriage, until the pressure to have a baby comes up. Things get tricky when she starts falling for one of her clients, not realizing it is secretly her husband. Will they be able to make it through this rough patch?

programme.title: Identical Love
programme.desc: After being left at the altar, Dr. Charlotte Hudson needs to escape life at home. She signs up to volunteer at a health clinic in a tropical country. But her plans of escaping are thrown off when she comes across her former fiancé's twin brother, Seth (a dentist), who is also volunteering with the clinic. As they spend time together, Seth falls in love with Charlotte, but she struggles to let go of seeing her fiancé every time she looks at Seth. The island romance will help her break free from the past and love Seth for who he is.

programme.title: Eat, Drink And Be Married
programme.desc: Three days from their wedding, Jess and Max are about to call it off. However, Jess starts to question her decision when Max's brother enlists the help of Billie to save the wedding, and in the process starts to fall for her.

programme.title: My One True Love
programme.desc: When 2 of the 3 things a fortune teller predicts come true, Ali wonders about the 3rd - finding true love with a man named John. Drawn to a fireman whose name isn't John, does she trust destiny or her heart?

programme.title: Finding Love in Big Sky
programme.desc: An independent country girl, Paisley, takes on the task of upholding her adored grandfather's ranch. After being denied the funding needed to refurbish the ranch, she is reintroduced to her ex-boyfriend Josh, a big-time marketing executive stationed in Denver who has been suspended from his current position at his company. Admitting to herself that she needs the help, Paisley agrees to work with Josh while he is town to come up with ideas on how to raise money for the farm.

programme.title: Next Door Nightmare
programme.desc: Sarah and Kyle move next door to a charismatic, but deeply disturbed psychopath.

programme.title: Darren and Chastity / Ryan / Julie
programme.desc: A family is subjected to a vicious attack during a brutal home invasion.

programme.title: Hidden Family Secrets
programme.desc: Melanie and her daughter are adjusting to life after husband and dad Scott died.

programme.title: A House on Fire
programme.desc: Deborah had the epitome of a perfect life. But not everything is as it seems.

programme.title: Next Door Nightmare
programme.desc: Sarah and Kyle move next door to a charismatic, but deeply disturbed psychopath.

programme.title: Wish You Were Dead
programme.desc: Hayley Udall tries to make ends meet for herself and her 14 year-old daughter while providing alimony for a horrible ex-husband. She wishes her problems with her ex could go away, and upon venting her frustrations one night, finds herself tangled up in a pact with two people (Melanie and Kevin) to “eliminate” each other's problems.

programme.title: The Bad Son
programme.desc: An elusive serial killer is killing innocent women in Seattle. The police and FBI are on the killer's trail but were never prepared to face a bizarre twist in the case.

programme.title: A Lethal Lesson
programme.desc: High school teacher Lauren is accused of an affair by a student, putting her job and life in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Perfect Soulmate
programme.desc: A poet with an abusive husband reaches out to a fan for help, only to find an even more dangerous companion.

programme.title: The Big Hit
programme.desc: A quartet of hit men are drawn into a moonlighting gig that turns sour when they kidnap an heiress with connections to the mob.

programme.title: Catch And Release
programme.desc: For a grieving fiancée, learning to love again requires the help of her late love's three best friends.

programme.title: The Animal
programme.desc: A bumbling police file clerk takes a walk on the wild side when a mad doctor repairs his body with animal parts.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: From the guys who brought you PAUL BLART: MALL COP, five high school pals reunite after 30 years at a July 4th celebration and wrestle with the challenges of adulthood.

programme.title: Tulsa
programme.desc: In Tulsa, after a rancher dies during a feud with a major oil company, his daughter, driven by revenge, starts digging for oil herself.

programme.title: You're Jinxed, Friend You've Met Sacramento
programme.desc: This fast-moving tale revolves around the kidnaping of a boxer's daughter. The boxer pays the ransom money but the girl is still not released. Her boyfriend decides to get her back his own way, killing her ruthless captor in a fierce duel.

programme.title: Life is Tough, Eh Providence
programme.desc: An eccentric bounty hunter named Providence captures and sets free a criminal in order to collect the same bounty over and over again in different states, until they discover that a local sheriff is up to something crooked.

programme.title: Long Days of Vengeance
programme.desc: After three years of brutal labor for a crime he didn't commit, ex-Sheriff Ted Barnett escapes prison to hunt down the three men who framed him for his father's murder. "Long Days of Vengeance" is a gripping spaghetti western about justice, revenge, and redemption under the scorching desert sun.

programme.title: Some Girls Do
programme.desc: Comedy spy film starring Richard Johnson and Daliah Lavi.

programme.title: Delayed Action
programme.desc: Ned is on the verge of committing suicide. When a criminal offers him a false identity Ned accepts and pretends to be the head of a criminal organisation. He realises there is a dark side to the syndicate when a young man kills himself.

programme.title: Passionate Summer
programme.desc: An idealistic young schoolmaster arrives at a Jamaican boarding school.

programme.title: The Divorce of Lady X
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier plays Logan, a divorce lawyer, stranded in overcrowded hotel.

programme.title: Press for Time
programme.desc: When Norman Shields lands a job at the Tinmouth Times, he creates complete havoc, particularly when reporting on the local beauty contest! Starring Norman Wisdom, playing four different characters, and featuring Angela Brown and Derek Bond.

programme.title: I AM HERE (English Dubbed)
programme.desc: A hot-blooded investigator vs. an outraged murderer. The extreme chase between two men entangled in cruel fate begins! He returned to the front lines of investigation and was tracking down a serial killer Kyu-jong. In the process, he finds out through the donation coordinator Ah-seung that Kyu-jong got an organ transplant from the same donor as himself and that the donor was a murderer he arrested himself in the past... Seon-du, the police investigator was once stabbed in his lungs while hunting down a murderer but was miraculously brought back to life through an organ transplant.

programme.title: BAIT (English Dubbed)
programme.desc: Living as a high school curling teacher, she accidentally meets Hyuk-soo, the coach related to her teammate's (captain) of the team, the Olympic medal was everything. To Joo-young, Korea's first Olympic gold medalist in women's curling and the skip After the encounter, Joo-young can't stand Hyuk-soo anymore as he even threatens her students. suicide. She decides to disclose who he really is and starts a new plan with a helper…She quits curling with a sense of responsibility and guilt after her teammate's suicide.

programme.title: Toxic Parents
programme.desc: Yoo-ri, a seemingly model student from a well-to do family suddenly commits suicide at a lakeside campsite with several people she met via a suicide group. Detectives suspect suicide, but her mother Hye-young firmly believes that her classmate Ye-na and homeroom teacher Gi-beom were the killers. Ye-na is an idol trainee and Gi-beom is a teacher who looked after Yoo-ri. As the investigation dives into the lives of these people, it spirals out of control due to conflicting statements between the three, but detectives find out that actions of Hye-young started causing cracks in Yoo-ri's heart. Deeply believing that she was doing everything possible for her child out of love, can Hye-young uncover the real truth behind her daughter's death?

programme.title: Evil Empire: Friday the 13th Chapter 2
programme.desc: At the same time, in a hospital in Pyongyang, North Korea, a female doctor discovers a phenomenon where the cells of the deceased are being revived. However, she is forced to flee to South Korea due to the authorities' pursuit. What is the key to the case that Jae-hyeok holds? Why are ruthless killers from the United States pursuing him? Why is the foreign police from Japan investigating the "Suicide Syndrome" in Korea? And why is North Korea trying to conceal the truth about a secret project from the Japanese military? A series of serial killings known as the "Suicide Syndrome" continue to occur simultaneously, and the whereabouts of both Phillip and Cheong-ha, who were investigating the case, remain mysterious. Meanwhile, the young police officer Jae-hyeok, who provided crucial clues to Cheong-ha in her time of crisis, finds himself relentlessly pursued by killers dispatched from Japan and the United States. Despite relying on information from an anonymous woman who calls him unilaterally, Jae-hyeok unwittingly gets drawn closer to the center of the case as the situation progresses. Genre

programme.title: YMCA Baseball Team
programme.desc: Korea's first baseball team wins games and the hearts and hopes of her people.

programme.title: The Silenced
programme.desc: With her class mates' mysterious disappearances Ju-ran gets involved with her school's dark secrets.

programme.title: Urban Myths
programme.desc: 10 different urban tales will take you into the realm of darkness where myth and reality become blurred.

programme.title: Man Of Will
programme.desc: Charged with the murder of a Japanese person involved in Empress's assassination Kim Chang-Soo is imprisoned and grows to fight for Korean independence.

programme.title: Lost Solace
programme.desc: Spence Cutler never felt empathy or guilt. However, a fateful encounter with a new drug is about to give him a dose of too much reality, and he takes a mind-bending trip down the psychedelic highway of consciousness to come face to face with his own morality and his own twisted soul.

programme.title: Strawberry Mansion
programme.desc: In the near future an unassuming dream tax auditor gets swept up in a cosmic journey through the life and dreams of an ageing eccentric.

programme.title: Flight 7500
programme.desc: A flight from Los Angeles to Tokyo is rocked by turbulence—and a terrifying force is unleashed in this spine-chilling journey into fear from the director of The Grudge.

programme.title: Breaking Infinity
programme.desc: A scientific researcher who has become unstuck in time must figure out what happened to him and stop the coming end of the world.

programme.title: Last Signal
programme.desc: When a meteor shower unexpectedly ravages her hometown, Lera's father finds ingenious ways to communicate with her from aboard the space station Mira.

programme.title: Cries In The Dark
programme.desc: (2006) Crime drama with Eva LaRue. When a detective's pregnant sister vanishes, she's on the hunt to find her. But in this race against time, desperation can turn deadly.

programme.desc: FAIR GAME is a riveting action-thriller based on the autobiography of real-life undercover CIA operative VALERIE PLAME (Naomi Watts), whose career was destroyed and marriage strained to its limits when her covert identity was exposed by a politically motivated press leak.

programme.title: Salt and fire
programme.desc: A scientist blames the head of a large company for an ecological disaster in South America. But when a volcano begins to show signs of erupting, they must unite to avoid a disaster.

programme.title: Peacock
programme.desc: John Skillpa, a quiet bank clerk living in tiny Peacock, Nebraska, prefers to live an invisible life. This might have to do with John's secret: he has another personality no one knows about, a woman who each morning cooks him breakfast before he starts his day. Then, in a moment, everything changes.

programme.title: Con Man
programme.desc: The unbelievable true story of Barry Minkow, the youngest person ever to defraud Wall Street and who by the age of 21 was worth a staggering 100 million dollars.

programme.desc: This tension-filled courtroom drama opens with the suicide of a Supreme Court justice. Then the young Justice Department employee to whom he had given privileged information is discovered dead. A deaf-mute Vietnam veteran is charged with her murder and Cher, a public defender, is appointed counsel.

programme.title: Lake Placid (1999)
programme.desc: A female paleontologist from New York City heads to Maine where local fish and game officials have discovered a gigantic and deadly 30-foot crocodile that appears to be living in one of the local .akes.

programme.desc: A brother mounts an extraordinary rescue effort to save his sister who is trapped on the world's most dangerous peak.

programme.desc: Two-time Academy Award winner Jodie Foster directs and co-stars with two-time Academy Award winner Mel Gibson in The Beaver - an emotional story about a man on a journey to re-discover his family and re-start his life.

programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: Black Warrant
programme.desc: A semi-retired special ops assassin and a DEA agent cross paths on separate missions to stop a cyber terrorist organization that has built a dangerous machine threatening to attack the power grid and bring catastrophe to the world.

programme.title: The Twisters
programme.desc: Dozens of deadly tornadoes converge in the Midwest, merging into a mega twister set to obliterate everything for hundreds of miles.

programme.title: Encounter
programme.desc: A group of friends make a remarkable discovery in a rural field - a crashed spacecraft - And there's a survivor. But when they bring the otherworldly being home, they soon discover that it holds even greater secrets than they could imagine.

programme.title: Hours
programme.desc: When his beloved wife dies in childbirth, Nolan (Paul Walker) is left to care for their newborn on his own while Hurricane Katrina simultaneously devastates the coast of Louisiana.
